TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kasuga, title = Kasuga, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kasuga} }

S.FORM: Kasuga Itiniay i Chunri Cen no Pingtung ko Kasuga a niyaro', 342 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,125 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,098 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Rukai 0.5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaso~u~u*a itiniaj i ʦħo~u~unri ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u kaso~u~u*a a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *.*%, ro~u~ukai *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kasuga Itiniay i Chunri Cen no Pingtung ko Kasuga a niyaro', 342 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 1,125 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 98% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 1,098 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 2% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 27 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Paiwan 95%, Amis 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Rukai 0.5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko imeng i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaso~u~u*a itiniaj i ʦħo~u~unri ʦən no~u piŋto~u~uŋ ko~u kaso~u~u*a a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, ** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u paiwan **%, amis *%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *.*%, ro~u~ukai *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u iməŋ i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
